title: Stepper
description: The stepper control is used for incrementing or decrementing numeric values.

Caption.description: The key name of the property.

IsEditable.description: Disables or enables interaction. The control will have a reduced opacity if this property is false.

HelperText.description: Helper text to be displayed if there is no validation view.

IsVisible.description: Sets the visibility of the control.

Separator.description: Sets the visibility of the separator line below the control. This property will take precedence over `ControlSeparator` in section and is only supported for Form Cell control in Sectioned Table and not supported in Form Cell Container.

Value.description: Initial value of the stepper control.

DecimalPlacesSupported.description: The number of decimal places supported for the stepper value. On iOS, this property sets the maximum decimal places that can be displayed or calculated.

OnValueChange.description: Action or rule to perform after the value has changed.

Validation.description: The validation view properties. However, styling in ValidationView will not be supported.

IncrementIcon.description: The icon to increase the stepper value.

DecrementIcon.description: The icon to decrease the stepper value.

IncrementIconIsCircular.description: Determines whether to set the increment icon as a circular shape.

DecrementIconIsCircular.description: Determines whether to set the decrement icon as a circular shape.

Background.description: The string value is a style class name of `Background`. Used as the default when a plain string is passed.

Stepper.description: The string value is a style class name of `Stepper`.

StepperTextField.description: The string value is a style class name of `StepperTextField`.

IncrementIcon.description: The string value is a style class name of `IncrementIcon`.

DecrementIcon.description: The string value is a style class name of `DecrementIcon`.

Caption.description: The string value is a style class name of `Caption`.

HelperText.description: The string value is a style class name for the helper text.
